introSection: Big Apple was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Peter Pan's Playground in Brighton, East Sussex, England, UK. From a single photograph, this coaster appears to have been a fairly modern Big Apple MB28 from Pinfari with a fiberglass apple, yellow track, green supports, a green train and red railings.
fullText: Big Apple was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Peter Pan's Playground in Brighton, East Sussex, England, UK. From a single photograph, this coaster appears to have been a fairly modern Big Apple MB28 from Pinfari with a fiberglass apple, yellow track, green supports, a green train and red railings.
